overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Apollo at night. The player character walks through ancient Greek temple grounds illuminated by fire braziers, enters a treasury building to view a hoplite statue, and approaches a monumental bronze statue of Apollo. The scene features classical stone architecture with columns, pediments, and scattered NPC pedestrians.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open courtyard area
turns right toward the treasury building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sanctuary entrance, passing fire braziers and stone columns, heading toward the treasury

entered.detail: large bronze bowl with flames illuminating the stone pathway
fluted classical Greek column with ornate capital
wooden beam ceiling structure providing partial cover
small stone temple structure with decorative lattice doors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character walking through a sanctuary entrance at night, illuminated by fire braziers. The camera moves through a covered portico with stone columns and checkered pavement, then exits into an open courtyard. The treasury building becomes visible on the right as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: treasury building interior with hoplite statue

events.description: enters the Treasury building through wooden lattice doors
stops walking to look up at the large hoplite statue
exits the treasury building back to the exterior courtyard

agents.ego_description: enters the treasury, approaches the hoplite statue, examines it closely by looking up and down, then exits the building

entered.detail: interior stone chamber with wooden lattice screens and warm lighting
large stone statue of a Greek warrior holding spear and shield
wooden beam ceiling with hanging oil lamp

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Treasury building, transitioning from the cool night air to a warmly lit interior. Inside, a large hoplite statue stands prominently against the back wall. The camera pans up to examine the statue's details before the character exits back to the exterior sanctuary grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: sanctuary courtyard with main temple and approach to Apollo statue

events.description: rounds the corner to view the main temple structure with large columns
turns left toward the distant Apollo statue visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking around the sanctuary exterior, passing other pedestrians, viewing the main temple structure and approaching the Apollo statue plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red robes walking along the stone path

entered.detail: large classical temple with tall fluted columns and decorated pediment
monumental bronze statue visible in the distance atop a high pedestal
large terracotta planter with flowering plants

segments.scene_description: Exiting the treasury, the character explores the open sanctuary courtyard under the night sky. The main temple with its impressive colonnade comes into view, while in the distance, the large bronze Apollo statue stands atop its pedestal. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the plaza as the character approaches the monument.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with monumental Apollo statue

events.description: stops at the base of the Apollo statue to look up at the monument
circles around the statue base examining the offerings and structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the large Apollo statue, examining it from various angles at the base, then moving away toward the stairs

entered.detail: decorated stone pedestal with offerings and garlands at the foundation
small dishes with candles and ritual offerings placed at the base
wide staircase leading up to the statue platform

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the monumental Apollo statue, moving from a distant view to standing at its base. The camera pans up to reveal the full height of the bronze figure against the night sky. After examining the offerings and decorative elements at the pedestal, the character begins to move away, revealing stairs and additional sanctuary structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit Greek sanctuary that transitions from enclosed porticos to the towering scale of a monumental bronze statue. It begins with the character walking through a covered entrance illuminated by fire braziers, moving across checkered pavement before emerging into an open courtyard. As the character enters the nearby treasury building, the scene shifts from the cool night air to a warmly lit interior centered around a large hoplite statue, before the camera follows the character back out into the plaza. The view then expands across the sanctuary grounds, passing a grand colonnaded temple and scattered pedestrians as the character draws closer to the distant figure of Apollo. Finally, the camera pans upward from the base of the monumental bronze statue to reveal its full height against the night sky before turning away toward the surrounding stairs and sanctuary structures.
